requirement_topic.en: Market Access — SAZ Conformity Assessment + Import Inspection (no single CE-style mark)
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——SAZ合格评定 + 进口检验（无单一CE式标志）
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——SAZ合格評定 + 進口檢驗（無單一CE式標誌）

summary.en: Zimbabwe has no single CE-equivalent mark covering safety, EMC, and energy together. Market access for household refrigerating appliances runs through (1) compliance with the applicable ZWS standards (adopted from IEC, frequently aligned with South African SANS) for electrical safety (IEC 60335-2-24) and EMC (CISPR 14); (2) conformity assessment / product certification by the Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ); and (3) import conformity inspection for regulated goods, which may require evidence of conformity (test reports, certificates) at or before clearance. Because Zimbabwe is landlocked, imports are typically routed by sea to Durban (South Africa) or Beira (Mozambique) and then by road/rail inland, so the conformity documentation must travel with the consignment for inspection. An in-country importer of record handles clearance and is the practical responsible party for placing the goods on the market. The most portable conformity evidence is an IECEE CB Scheme test report (IEC 60335-2-24) plus CISPR 14-based EMC data, presented for SAZ assessment and import inspection.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦没有同时涵盖安全、电磁兼容和能效的单一CE等效标志。家用制冷器具的市场准入须经：（1）符合适用的ZWS标准（采用自IEC，常与南非SANS对齐），涵盖电气安全（IEC 60335-2-24）和电磁兼容（CISPR 14）；（2）由津巴布韦标准协会（SAZ）进行合格评定/产品认证；及（3）对受监管货物的进口符合性检验，可能要求在清关时或之前提供符合性证据（检测报告、证书）。由于津巴布韦为内陆国，进口货物通常经海运至德班（南非）或贝拉（莫桑比克），再经公路/铁路转运内陆，故符合性文件须随货同行以备检验。境内进口商（记录进口商）办理清关，并为投放市场的实际责任方。最具可移植性的符合性证据为IECEE CB体系检测报告（IEC 60335-2-24）加基于CISPR 14的电磁兼容数据，提交SAZ评定及进口检验。
summary.zht: 辛巴威沒有同時涵蓋安全、電磁相容和能效的單一CE等效標誌。家用製冷器具的市場准入須經：（1）符合適用的ZWS標準（採用自IEC，常與南非SANS對齊），涵蓋電氣安全（IEC 60335-2-24）和電磁相容（CISPR 14）；（2）由辛巴威標準協會（SAZ）進行合格評定/產品認證；及（3）對受監管貨物的進口符合性檢驗，可能要求在清關時或之前提供符合性證據（檢測報告、證書）。由於辛巴威為內陸國，進口貨物通常經海運至德班（南非）或貝拉（莫三比克），再經公路/鐵路轉運內陸，故符合性文件須隨貨同行以備檢驗。境內進口商（記錄進口商）辦理清關，並為投放市場的實際責任方。最具可移植性的符合性證據為IECEE CB體系檢測報告（IEC 60335-2-24）加基於CISPR 14的電磁相容數據，提交SAZ評定及進口檢驗。

standards_or_laws: Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) — national standards body; product certification / conformity assessment against ZWS standards
ZWS / IEC 60335-2-24 (electrical safety) and ZWS / CISPR 14 (EMC) — applicable product standards (adopted from IEC; aligned with SANS)
Import conformity inspection for regulated goods — evidence of conformity required at/before customs clearance (confirm current scheme with SAZ and the importer)
IECEE CB Scheme test report (IEC 60335-2-24) — most portable conformity evidence for SAZ assessment / import inspection
Logistics: landlocked — imports routed via Durban (South Africa) or Beira (Mozambique) then road/rail inland

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, plus a separate China Energy Label (GB 12021.2). CCC is a mandatory third-party certification by CNCA-designated bodies — not manufacturer self-declaration. China has no single CE-equivalent mark either: CCC covers safety/EMC, and the energy label is separate. Neither the CCC certificate nor the China Energy Label is automatically accepted for Zimbabwe market access; they evidence the Chinese domestic regime, not Zimbabwe conformity assessment or import inspection.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1），并另有独立的中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为CNCA指定机构的强制性第三方认证——非制造商自我声明。中国同样没有单一CE等效标志：CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，能效标识独立。CCC证书及中国能效标识均不被津巴布韦市场准入自动接受；它们证明的是中国国内制度，而非津巴布韦合格评定或进口检验。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1），並另有獨立的中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為CNCA指定機構的強制性第三方認證——非製造商自我聲明。中國同樣沒有單一CE等效標誌：CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，能效標識獨立。CCC證書及中國能效標識均不被辛巴威市場准入自動接受；它們證明的是中國國內制度，而非辛巴威合格評定或進口檢驗。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a Zimbabwe-facing conformity package because CCC and the China Energy Label do not transfer: (1) Conformity evidence in the right form — provide IEC 60335-2-24 (ideally an IECEE CB report) and CISPR 14-based EMC test data referencing the international/ZWS standards, not GB-only reports, for SAZ assessment and import inspection. (2) In-country importer — an importer of record established in Zimbabwe is needed to clear customs and place goods on the market; there is no manufacturer self-declaration CE-style route. (3) Logistics and documentation — as a landlocked country, goods transit Durban or Beira; conformity documents must accompany the consignment for inspection, and any import licence / inspection certificate required for regulated goods must be obtained. (4) Configuration — confirm 230 V / 50 Hz rating and local plug type (see safety row). Exporters should confirm the current SAZ certification route and import-inspection scheme with SAZ and the importer before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须建立面向津巴布韦的符合性文件包，因为CCC和中国能效标识不可转移：（1）正确形式的符合性证据——为SAZ评定及进口检验提供IEC 60335-2-24（理想为IECEE CB报告）及基于CISPR 14、引用国际/ZWS标准的电磁兼容检测数据，而非仅有GB的报告。（2）境内进口商——须有在津巴布韦设立的记录进口商办理清关并投放市场；不存在CE式制造商自我声明路径。（3）物流与文件——作为内陆国，货物经德班或贝拉中转；符合性文件须随货以备检验，受监管货物所需的进口许可/检验证书须取得。（4）配置——确认230 V / 50 Hz额定及本地插头类型（见安全行）。出口商应在出货前向SAZ及进口商确认当前SAZ认证路径及进口检验方案。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須建立面向辛巴威的符合性文件包，因為CCC和中國能效標識不可轉移：（1）正確形式的符合性證據——為SAZ評定及進口檢驗提供IEC 60335-2-24（理想為IECEE CB報告）及基於CISPR 14、引用國際/ZWS標準的電磁相容檢測數據，而非僅有GB的報告。（2）境內進口商——須有在辛巴威設立的記錄進口商辦理清關並投放市場；不存在CE式製造商自我聲明路徑。（3）物流與文件——作為內陸國，貨物經德班或貝拉中轉；符合性文件須隨貨以備檢驗，受監管貨物所需的進口許可/檢驗證書須取得。（4）配置——確認230 V / 50 Hz額定及本地插頭類型（見安全行）。出口商應在出貨前向SAZ及進口商確認當前SAZ認證路徑及進口檢驗方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory route — compliance with applicable ZWS standards plus SAZ conformity assessment and, for regulated goods, import conformity inspection are required for market access; an in-country importer of record is needed. No single CE-style mark. Exact certification/inspection scheme should be confirmed with SAZ.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zimbabwe market access for refrigerators is via ZWS standards + SAZ conformity assessment + import inspection, with an in-country importer of record — there is no single CE-style mark and Chinese CCC / China Energy Label do not transfer. Present IEC 60335-2-24 (ideally IECEE CB) and CISPR 14 EMC evidence, route logistics via Durban or Beira, and confirm the current SAZ certification and import-inspection scheme with SAZ and the importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 津巴布韦冰箱市场准入须经ZWS标准 + SAZ合格评定 + 进口检验，并须有境内记录进口商——没有单一CE式标志，中国CCC / 中国能效标识不可转移。须提交IEC 60335-2-24（理想为IECEE CB）及CISPR 14电磁兼容证据，物流经德班或贝拉，并在出货前向SAZ及进口商确认当前SAZ认证及进口检验方案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 辛巴威冰箱市場准入須經ZWS標準 + SAZ合格評定 + 進口檢驗，並須有境內記錄進口商——沒有單一CE式標誌，中國CCC / 中國能效標識不可轉移。須提交IEC 60335-2-24（理想為IECEE CB）及CISPR 14電磁相容證據，物流經德班或貝拉，並在出貨前向SAZ及進口商確認當前SAZ認證及進口檢驗方案。

requirement_topic.en: Importer of Record + Horizontal Regimes (no EU-style RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise)
requirement_topic.zh: 记录进口商 + 横向法规（无欧盟式RoHS / 电池 / 室外噪声）
requirement_topic.zht: 記錄進口商 + 橫向法規（無歐盟式RoHS / 電池 / 室外噪聲）

summary.en: For goods manufactured outside Zimbabwe, the practical responsible party is the in-country importer of record (a Zimbabwe-established business), who clears customs, satisfies import-inspection requirements, and places the appliance on the local market. Unlike the EU, Zimbabwe does not require a foreign manufacturer to appoint a statutory in-country authorised representative for product-compliance purposes in the EU 2019/1020 sense; the importer fills the responsible-operator role commercially and for customs. Equally important, Zimbabwe does not operate EU-style horizontal product regimes for refrigerators: there is no EU-RoHS-equivalent restriction-of-hazardous-substances marking regime, no EU Batteries Regulation analogue, and no EU outdoor-noise (Directive 2000/14/EC) labelling regime applicable to household refrigerators. Environmental controls that do apply are the ozone/refrigerant import controls under the Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment (see refrigerant row), not a horizontal substances directive. Exporters should still meet good-practice material and safety requirements, but should not assume an EU-style RoHS/battery/noise compliance gate exists in Zimbabwe.
summary.zh: 对于在津巴布韦境外制造的货物，实际责任方为境内记录进口商（在津巴布韦设立的企业），其办理清关、满足进口检验要求并将器具投放本地市场。与欧盟不同，津巴布韦不要求外国制造商为产品合规目的（欧盟2019/1020意义上）委任法定境内授权代表；进口商以商业及清关身份履行责任运营商角色。同样重要的是，津巴布韦不对冰箱实行欧盟式横向产品法规：没有等同欧盟RoHS的有害物质限制标志制度，没有欧盟《电池法规》对应物，也没有适用于家用冰箱的欧盟室外噪声（指令2000/14/EC）标识制度。确实适用的环境管控是《蒙特利尔议定书》/基加利修正案下的臭氧/制冷剂进口管控（见制冷剂行），而非横向物质指令。出口商仍应满足良好实践的材料及安全要求，但不应臆断津巴布韦存在欧盟式RoHS/电池/噪声合规门槛。
summary.zht: 對於在辛巴威境外製造的貨物，實際責任方為境內記錄進口商（在辛巴威設立的企業），其辦理清關、滿足進口檢驗要求並將器具投放本地市場。與歐盟不同，辛巴威不要求外國製造商為產品合規目的（歐盟2019/1020意義上）委任法定境內授權代表；進口商以商業及清關身份履行責任運營商角色。同樣重要的是，辛巴威不對冰箱實行歐盟式橫向產品法規：沒有等同歐盟RoHS的有害物質限制標誌制度，沒有歐盟《電池法規》對應物，也沒有適用於家用冰箱的歐盟室外噪聲（指令2000/14/EC）標識制度。確實適用的環境管控是《蒙特利爾議定書》/基加利修正案下的臭氧/製冷劑進口管控（見製冷劑行），而非橫向物質指令。出口商仍應滿足良好實踐的材料及安全要求，但不應臆斷辛巴威存在歐盟式RoHS/電池/噪聲合規門檻。

standards_or_laws: In-country importer of record — Zimbabwe-established business responsible for customs clearance, import inspection, and market placement
No EU-style statutory authorised-representative obligation (no Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 analogue) — importer fills the responsible-operator role
No EU-RoHS-equivalent hazardous-substances restriction marking regime for refrigerators in Zimbabwe
No EU Batteries Regulation analogue and no EU outdoor-noise (Directive 2000/14/EC) labelling regime for household refrigerators
Applicable environmental control: Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment ozone-refrigerant import controls (see refrigerant row)

summary.en: China has its own horizontal regimes that differ from both the EU and Zimbabwe: China RoHS (Management Methods for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products / SJ/T 11364 marking) applies to electrical/electronic products domestically, and battery and other product rules exist under separate Chinese frameworks. For export to Zimbabwe, the responsible party in the destination is the importer of record, not a CCC certificate holder; China has no statutory obligation to appoint a foreign authorised representative. Chinese China-RoHS compliance is not required by Zimbabwe and Zimbabwe imposes no equivalent RoHS/battery/noise marking — so these are not transferable obligations in either direction.
summary.zh: 中国有自身的横向法规，与欧盟及津巴布韦均不同：中国RoHS（《电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法》/SJ/T 11364标志）在国内适用于电器电子产品，电池及其他产品规则在另行的中国框架下存在。对于出口至津巴布韦，目的地的责任方为记录进口商，而非CCC证书持有人；中国无委任外国授权代表的法定义务。津巴布韦不要求中国RoHS合规，且津巴布韦不施加等同的RoHS/电池/噪声标志——故这些义务在任一方向均不可转移。
summary.zht: 中國有自身的橫向法規，與歐盟及辛巴威均不同：中國RoHS（《電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法》/SJ/T 11364標誌）在國內適用於電器電子產品，電池及其他產品規則在另行的中國框架下存在。對於出口至辛巴威，目的地的責任方為記錄進口商，而非CCC證書持有人；中國無委任外國授權代表的法定義務。辛巴威不要求中國RoHS合規，且辛巴威不施加等同的RoHS/電池/噪聲標誌——故這些義務在任一方向均不可轉移。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS — Management Methods for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products; SJ/T 11364 marking (domestic China requirement; not required by Zimbabwe)
No Chinese statutory obligation to appoint a foreign-country authorised representative for exports

gap.en: The key points for exporters are about what is NOT required and who carries responsibility: (1) Importer of record, not an AR — Zimbabwe relies on the in-country importer rather than an EU-style mandated authorised representative; the manufacturer should ensure a reliable Zimbabwe importer is in place and named for customs/inspection. (2) No EU-style horizontal regimes — there is no Zimbabwe RoHS marking, no battery-regulation analogue, and no outdoor-noise labelling regime for household refrigerators, so exporters should not build (or pay for) EU-RoHS/battery/noise deliverables expecting Zimbabwe to require them. (3) Environmental control is via ozone/refrigerant import licensing (Montreal/Kigali), not a substances directive. (4) Residual diligence — exporters should still confirm with SAZ and the importer whether any specific marking, labelling-in-English, or documentation requirements attach at import inspection, since requirements evolve. This row is intended to prevent over-compliance against non-existent EU-style gates while flagging the importer-of-record dependency.
gap.zh: 对出口商的关键点在于哪些并非必需以及谁承担责任：（1）记录进口商而非授权代表——津巴布韦依赖境内进口商，而非欧盟式法定授权代表；制造商应确保有可靠的津巴布韦进口商到位并在清关/检验中具名。（2）无欧盟式横向法规——津巴布韦没有RoHS标志、没有电池法规对应物，也没有家用冰箱的室外噪声标识制度，故出口商不应为津巴布韦构建（或付费）欧盟式RoHS/电池/噪声交付物。（3）环境管控通过臭氧/制冷剂进口许可（蒙特利尔/基加利）实现，而非物质指令。（4）剩余尽职——出口商仍应向SAZ及进口商确认进口检验时是否附带任何特定标志、英文标识或文件要求，因要求会演进。本行旨在防止针对不存在的欧盟式门槛过度合规，同时提示记录进口商的依赖关系。
gap.zht: 對出口商的關鍵點在於哪些並非必需以及誰承擔責任：（1）記錄進口商而非授權代表——辛巴威依賴境內進口商，而非歐盟式法定授權代表；製造商應確保有可靠的辛巴威進口商到位並在清關/檢驗中具名。（2）無歐盟式橫向法規——辛巴威沒有RoHS標誌、沒有電池法規對應物，也沒有家用冰箱的室外噪聲標識制度，故出口商不應為辛巴威構建（或付費）歐盟式RoHS/電池/噪聲交付物。（3）環境管控通過臭氧/製冷劑進口許可（蒙特利爾/基加利）實現，而非物質指令。（4）剩餘盡職——出口商仍應向SAZ及進口商確認進口檢驗時是否附帶任何特定標誌、英文標識或文件要求，因要求會演進。本行旨在防止針對不存在的歐盟式門檻過度合規，同時提示記錄進口商的依賴關係。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory dependency — an in-country importer of record is required for customs clearance and market placement. No EU-style authorised-representative obligation; no EU-style RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise regime for household refrigerators. Ozone/refrigerant import controls (Montreal/Kigali) do apply.
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China imposes China RoHS domestically and has no statutory obligation to appoint a foreign authorised representative for exports; Chinese horizontal regimes are not required by Zimbabwe

source.publisher: Zimbabwe Revenue Authority (ZIMRA) — customs and import administration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Zimbabwe, the in-country importer of record is the responsible party — there is no EU-style mandated authorised representative, and no EU-style RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise regime applies to household refrigerators. The applicable environmental control is ozone/refrigerant import licensing under Montreal/Kigali. Exporters should secure a reliable Zimbabwe importer, avoid over-building non-required EU-style deliverables, and confirm any import-inspection marking/labelling requirements with SAZ and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于津巴布韦，境内记录进口商为责任方——没有欧盟式法定授权代表，也没有适用于家用冰箱的欧盟式RoHS / 电池 / 室外噪声制度。适用的环境管控是蒙特利尔/基加利下的臭氧/制冷剂进口许可。出口商应确保可靠的津巴布韦进口商，避免过度构建非必需的欧盟式交付物，并向SAZ及进口商确认任何进口检验标志/标识要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於辛巴威，境內記錄進口商為責任方——沒有歐盟式法定授權代表，也沒有適用於家用冰箱的歐盟式RoHS / 電池 / 室外噪聲制度。適用的環境管控是蒙特利爾/基加利下的臭氧/製冷劑進口許可。出口商應確保可靠的辛巴威進口商，避免過度構建非必需的歐盟式交付物，並向SAZ及進口商確認任何進口檢驗標誌/標識要求。
